title: verify-attestation-sev input
description: Input piped on stdin to `tinfoil-conformance verify-attestation-sev`. Covers AMD SEV-SNP attestation verification (Tinfoil SPEC §3).

attestation_doc_b64.description: Standard base64-encoded gzipped 1184-byte SEV-SNP attestation report (per SPEC §3.1).

vcek_der_b64.description: Standard base64-encoded DER VCEK certificate (Versioned Chip Endorsement Key, per SPEC §3.3.3). Signs the SEV-SNP report; chains to AMD SEV Key (ASK) → AMD Root Key (ARK).

amd_root_ca_pem.description: Optional PEM-encoded AMD Root Key (ARK). When set, swaps the SDK's embedded ARK during verification — used by Phase 2C synthetic-chain fixtures.

ask_pem.description: Optional PEM-encoded AMD SEV Key (ASK). When set, overrides the SDK's embedded ASK.

expiration_check_date_unix.description: Trusted current time (seconds since epoch). Compared against VCEK cert NotAfter and any CRL nextUpdate fields.

expected_measurement_hex.description: Pin on body.measurement (48 bytes). Mismatch → MEASUREMENT_MISMATCH.

expected_host_data_hex.description: Pin on body.host_data (32 bytes — SPEC §8.3 TLS pinning lives here). Mismatch → HOST_DATA_MISMATCH.

expected_report_data_hex.description: Pin on body.report_data (64 bytes — TLS pubkey fingerprint + HPKE pubkey per Tinfoil convention). Mismatch → REPORT_DATA_MISMATCH.

min_tcb_bl_spl.description: Minimum bootloader SVN for §3.7 TCB validation.

enforce_spec_defaults.description: Apply SPEC §3.7 default policy: guest_policy.debug MUST be 0; guest_policy.single_socket should be checked; mask sanity per §3.2.2.
